supplementalResearch.title: 15. Alibaba/Qwen DashScope (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 15. Alibaba/Qwen DashScope (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. **Best all-in-one Chinese provider for international access.**

**LLMs:** `qwen3-max` ($1.20/$6.00), `qwen3.5-plus` ($0.40/$2.40), `qwen3.5-flash` ($0.10/$0.40), `qwen-plus` ($0.40/$1.20). Free: 1M tokens/model for 90 days.

**TTS:** `qwen3-tts-flash` and `qwen3-tts-flash-realtime` (~$13/1M chars). **10 languages** (ZH, EN, JA, KO, DE, FR, RU, PT, ES, IT). 9+ premium voices. Voice cloning from 3-second audio.

**STT:** `qwen3-asr-flash` and `qwen3-asr-flash-realtime`. **52 languages** + 22 Chinese dialects. Async file transcription up to 12h audio.

**OpenAI-compatible** endpoint: `https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1`. Regions: **Singapore, US (Virginia), Frankfurt, Hong Kong, Beijing**. USD billing. No Chinese phone required.

supplementalResearch.title: 8. DeepSeek (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 8. DeepSeek (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. Extremely cheap. **All data processed in mainland China.**

**Models:**

| Model ID | Input (cache miss) $/1M | Input (cache hit) $/1M | Output $/1M | Context |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `deepseek-chat` | $0.28 | **$0.028** | $0.42 | 128K |
| `deepseek-reasoner` | $0.28 | $0.028 | $0.42 | 128K |

Both map to DeepSeek-V3.2. Automatic context caching (no config needed). Max output: 8K (chat) / 64K (reasoner).

**Rate limits:** None enforced — best-effort serving. No tiered plans.

**Free tier:** **5 million free tokens** on registration (valid 30 days). PayPal/card billing.

**Datacenters:** **Mainland China only** (Hangzhou, Hohhot). One international deployment in Saudi Arabia (Aramco). API accessible internationally but all data flows through China.

**GDPR:** ⚠️ **No GDPR adequacy decision for China.** Subject to Chinese national security laws. No SCCs mentioned.

**Integration notes:** **OpenAI-compatible API**. Base URL: `https://api.deepseek.com`. Also supports Anthropic API format. SSE streaming.

---

Excellent international access via platform.minimax.io. No Chinese phone required.

| Model ID | Pricing | Language |

**Free tier:** No credit card required. Free API key from console.groq.com. Lower rate limits than paid. **This is the most important free tier for the app's default provider.**

**Paid tiers:** Developer (pay-as-you-go, 10× higher limits, 25% cost discounts). Enterprise (custom). Prompt caching: 50% off. Batch API: 50% off.

**Datacenters:** US (Dallas), Canada, Finland (Helsinki), Saudi Arabia. SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA compliant.

**Integration notes:** Fully **OpenAI-compatible API**. Drop-in replacement — change base_url only. Official Python/JS SDK. Works with OpenAI SDK.

**Status:** Active. Two modes: hosted API at build.nvidia.com (prototyping) and self-hosted NIM containers (production).

**LLM models (hosted API):**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Notes |

| `nvidia/nemotron-nano-9b-v2` | $0.04 (or Free) | $0.16 (or Free) | Reasoning, tool use |

| `nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1` | Free (or $0.60) | Free (or $1.80) | Top-tier |
| `nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b` | $0.10 | $0.50 | LatentMoE |

**STT (Riva ASR NIM containers):**

| Model | Languages | Streaming |
|---|---|---|
| `parakeet-1-1b-rnnt-multilingual` | **25 languages** (auto-detect, diarization) | Yes |
| `parakeet-1-1b-ctc-en-us` | English | Yes |
| `nemotron-asr-streaming` | English | Yes (80ms–1120ms chunks) |
| `canary-1b` | en, de, fr, es (+ translation) | Offline |
| `whisper-large-v3` | 57+ languages | Offline |

**TTS (Riva TTS NIM containers):**

| Model | Languages | Voices |
|---|---|---|
| `magpie-tts-multilingual` | **9 languages** (en, es, fr, de, zh, vi, it, hi, ja) | Many with emotional variants |
| `magpie-tts-zeroshot` | English | Voice cloning (3-10s audio) |
| `fastpitch-hifigan-en-us` | English | Legacy |

APIs: gRPC + WebSocket for speech. OpenAI-compatible REST for LLMs.

**Free tier:** 1,000 inference credits on signup. Free 90-day AI Enterprise trial. Many models have free endpoints.

**Self-hosted pricing:** NVIDIA AI Enterprise license: **$4,500/GPU/year**. No per-token charges.

**Datacenters:** Hosted API on DGX Cloud. Self-hosted: any NVIDIA GPU infrastructure.

**Integration notes:** LLMs use OpenAI-compatible REST. Speech uses gRPC + WebSocket (Riva protocol). Docker containers for self-hosting. GPU requirement: Compute Capability ≥8.0, 16+ GB VRAM.

supplementalResearch.title: 2. Anthropic (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 2. Anthropic (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. Messages API at `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages`

**Models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Max Output |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `claude-opus-4-6` | $5.00 | $25.00 | **1M** | 128K |
| `claude-sonnet-4-6` | $3.00 | $15.00 | **1M** | 64K |
| `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` | $1.00 | $5.00 | 200K | 64K |
| `claude-opus-4-5-20250514` | $5.00 | $25.00 | 1M | 128K |
| `claude-haiku-3-5-20241022` | $0.80 | $4.00 | 200K | 8K |

Batch API: 50% off all tokens. Prompt caching: cache read 0.1× (90% savings). Fast Mode (Opus 4.6 only): $30/$150 per MTok. 1M context GA since March 13, 2026 for Opus/Sonnet 4.6.

**Rate limits:** Tier-based system ($5→$50→$100→$400 cumulative spend). Extended thinking and adaptive thinking supported on 4.6 models.

**Free tier:** Small initial credits for new users; no permanent free API tier.

**Datacenters:** US-based (GCP infrastructure). US-only inference available via `inference_geo` parameter at 1.1× pricing. EU residency via AWS Bedrock or Google Vertex AI with 10% premium.

**GDPR:** SOC 2, DPA available, Standard Contractual Clauses, zero data retention option.

**Integration notes:** Anthropic uses its own Messages API (not OpenAI-compatible). SSE streaming. No audio capabilities whatsoever. Available on AWS Bedrock (`anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1`) and Vertex AI (`claude-opus-4-6`).

supplementalResearch.title: 3. Google (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 3. Google (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Two platforms: Google AI Studio (API key auth, free tier) and Vertex AI (service account, enterprise).

**LLM models (Gemini):**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` | $2.00 (≤200K) / $4.00 (>200K) | $12.00 / $18.00 | 1M | Preview, paid only |
| `gemini-3-flash-preview` | $0.50 | $3.00 | 1M | Preview |
| `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` | $0.25 | $1.50 | 1M | Preview |
| `gemini-2.5-pro` | $1.25 (≤200K) / $2.50 (>200K) | $10.00 / $15.00 | 1M | **Stable GA** |
| `gemini-2.5-flash` | $0.30 | $2.50 | 1M | Stable GA |
| `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` | $0.10 | $0.40 | 1M | Stable GA |

`gemini-2.0-flash` deprecated, retiring June 1, 2026. Batch API: 50% off. Context caching: ~10% of input rate.

**Gemini TTS (via Gemini API):**

| Model ID | Text In $/1M | Audio Out $/1M | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts` | $0.50 | $10.00 | 30 speakers, 70-80+ locales |
| `gemini-2.5-pro-preview-tts` | $1.00 | $20.00 | Higher fidelity |

**Cloud TTS pricing:**

| Voice Type | $/1M chars | Free Monthly |
|---|---|---|
| Chirp 3: HD | $30.00 | 1M chars |
| Studio | $160.00 | 1M chars |
| Neural2 | $16.00 | 1M chars |
| WaveNet | $4.00 | 4M chars |
| Standard | $4.00 | 4M chars |

Chirp 3 HD: 30 voice styles across **31+ languages**, partial SSML support. Voice names: `<locale>-Chirp3-HD-<voice>` (e.g., `en-US-Chirp3-HD-Kore`). Instant Custom Voice (cloning): $60/1M chars.

**Cloud STT:**

| Feature | Price |
|---|---|
| Standard (0–500K min) | $0.016/min |
| Dynamic Batch | $0.003/min |
| Medical models | $0.078/min |

Chirp 3 model: **85+ languages**, streaming support. Free tier: 60 min/month. Max sync audio: ~1 min; batch: unlimited. APIs: gRPC and REST.

**Free tier (AI Studio):** No credit card. Full 1M token context. Gemini 2.5 Pro: 5 RPM/100 RPD. Gemini 2.5 Flash: 10 RPM/250 RPD. Data may be used to improve Google products on free tier only. $300 cloud credit for new Google Cloud accounts.

**Datacenters:** Multi-region: us-central1, europe-west4, asia-southeast1, and many more. Full EU data residency on Vertex AI.

**GDPR:** Full compliance on Vertex AI. DPA, CMEK support, SOC 2, ISO 27001. AI Studio paid tier: data NOT used to improve products.

**Integration notes:** Unified `google-genai` SDK for both AI Studio and Vertex AI. OpenAI-compatible endpoint available. gRPC support on Vertex AI. WebSocket for Live API.

---

supplementalResearch.title: 4. Microsoft Azure (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 4. Microsoft Azure (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Full speech stack.

Azure OpenAI offers GPT-5.x, GPT-4.1, o-series models at **identical pricing to direct OpenAI**. Fine-tuning adds $1.70–$3.00/hr overhead.

**Azure Speech TTS:** **500+ neural voices** across **140+ languages**. Neural voices: **$16/1M chars**. HD voices (LLM-powered emotion): available. Custom Neural Voice: $24/1M chars. Free tier: **0.5M chars/month** (always free). SSML fully supported. WebSocket streaming via Speech SDK. Regions: 50+ Azure regions.

**Azure Speech STT:** **$1.00/hr** real-time, **$0.36/hr** batch. 100+ languages. Free tier: **5 hrs/month** (always free). Custom models, diarization, language ID. WebSocket streaming. Commitment: volume tiers down to $0.50/hr.

GDPR: Full EU data residency, 50+ compliance certifications including HIPAA, FedRAMP.

supplementalResearch.title: 1. OpenAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 1. OpenAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. The de facto API standard. Base URL: `https://api.openai.com/v1/`

**LLM models (March 2026):**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Max Output |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-5.4` | $2.50 (short) / $5.00 (long) | $15.00 / $22.50 | 400K–1.05M | 128K |
| `gpt-5.4-mini` | $0.75 | $4.50 | 400K | 128K |
| `gpt-5.4-nano` | $0.20 | $1.25 | 400K | 128K |
| `gpt-5.4-pro` | $30.00 / $60.00 | $180.00 / $270.00 | 400K–1.05M | 128K |
| `gpt-5.2` | $1.75 | $14.00 | 200K+ | — |
| `gpt-5` | $1.25 | $10.00 | 200K+ | — |
| `gpt-5-mini` | $0.25 | $2.00 | 200K+ | — |
| `gpt-4.1` | $2.00 | $8.00 | 1.05M | — |
| `gpt-4.1-mini` | $0.40 | $1.60 | 1.05M | — |
| `gpt-4.1-nano` | $0.10 | $0.40 | 1.05M | — |
| `gpt-4o` | $2.50 | $10.00 | 128K | — |
| `gpt-4o-mini` | $0.15 | $0.60 | 128K | — |
| `o4-mini` | $1.10 | $4.40 | — | — |
| `o3` | $2.00–$10.00 | $8.00–$40.00 | — | — |
| `o3-mini` | Lower | Lower | — | — |
| `o1` | $15.00 | $60.00 | — | — |

Long-context pricing activates above ~270K input tokens (2× input, 1.5× output). Batch/Flex pricing is 50% off standard. Date-pinned snapshots available (e.g., `gpt-5.4-2026-03-05`).

**TTS models:**

| Model ID | Pricing | Voices | Languages | Max Input |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-4o-mini-tts` | $0.60/1M text tokens + $12.00/1M audio tokens (~$0.015/min) | 13+ (alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer, verse, marin, cedar) | 50+ | 2,000 tokens |
| `tts-1` | $15.00/1M chars | 6 (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer) | — | 4,096 chars |
| `tts-1-hd` | $30.00/1M chars | 6 | — | 4,096 chars |

`gpt-4o-mini-tts` is steerable via system prompt (tone, emotion, accent, speed). Output formats: MP3, Opus, AAC, FLAC, WAV, PCM at 48kHz. Full streaming support.

**STT models:**

| Model ID | Pricing | Max File | Languages | Streaming |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-4o-mini-transcribe` | **$0.003/min** ($0.18/hr) | 25 MB | 99+ | Yes |
| `gpt-4o-transcribe` | $0.006/min ($0.36/hr) | 25 MB | 99+ | Yes |
| `gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize` | $0.006/min | 25 MB | 99+ | No |
| `whisper-1` | $0.006/min ($0.36/hr) | 25 MB | 99+ | No |

Supported audio formats: flac, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, webm.

**Realtime API (speech-to-speech):**

| Model ID | Audio In $/1M | Audio Out $/1M | Connection |
|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-realtime` | $32.00 | $64.00 | WebSocket, WebRTC, SIP |
| `gpt-realtime-mini` | $10.00 | $20.00 | WebSocket, WebRTC, SIP |

Approximate cost: ~$0.06/min audio input, ~$0.24/min audio output on the full model.

**Rate limits:** 5-tier system (Free to Tier 5). Free tier: $100/month usage limit. Tier 1 ($5 paid): ~500K TPM, ~1,000 RPM. Tier 5 ($1,000+ paid, 30 days): up to $200,000/month.

**Free tier:** New accounts receive **$5 in free credits** (3-month expiry). No credit card required.

**Datacenters:** Hosted on Microsoft Azure. Data residency in US, EU, UK, Canada, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, India, Australia, UAE. EU residency has zero data retention; +10% price uplift for GPT-5.4 regional endpoints.

**GDPR:** SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001/27701, HIPAA (BAA available), DPA available, zero data retention option. API data not used for training by default.

**Integration notes:** OpenAI's API format is the industry standard. SSE streaming for text, WebSocket for Realtime (`wss://api.openai.com/v1/realtime`), WebRTC for browser-native voice, SIP for telephony. Official Python/Node.js/Go/Java/.NET SDKs.

---

supplementalResearch.title: 9. xAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 9. xAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. TTS launched **March 16, 2026** (Beta).

**LLM models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context |
|---|---|---|---|
| `grok-4.20-reasoning` | TBD | TBD | **2,000,000** |
| `grok-4-1-fast-reasoning` | **$0.20** | **$0.50** | 2,000,000 |
| `grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning` | $0.20 | $0.50 | 2,000,000 |
| `grok-4` | $3.00 | $15.00 | 256,000 |
| `grok-3` | $3.00 | $15.00 | 131,072 |
| `grok-3-mini` | $0.30 | $0.50 | 131,072 |

Automatic prompt caching: ~75% discount. Batch API: 50% off.

**TTS (Beta, launched March 16, 2026):**

| Voice ID | Type | Tone |
|---|---|---|
| `eve` | Female | Energetic, upbeat (default) |
| `ara` | Female | Warm, friendly |
| `rex` | Male | Confident, professional |
| `sal` | Neutral | Smooth, balanced |
| `leo` | Male | Authoritative |

Pricing: **$4.20/1M characters**. REST: `POST https://api.x.ai/v1/tts` (max 15,000 chars). WebSocket: `wss://api.x.ai/v1/tts` (unlimited, multi-utterance sessions). **20 languages** (en, ar-EG, ar-SA, ar-AE, bn, zh, fr, de, hi, id, it, ja, ko, pt-BR, pt-PT, ru, es-MX, es-ES, tr, vi). Codecs: mp3, wav, pcm, mulaw, alaw. Expressive tags: `[laugh]`, `[sigh]`, `<whisper>`, `<soft>`, `<singing>`, etc.

**Voice Agent API:** `wss://api.x.ai/v1/realtime` — **$0.05/min** ($3.00/hr), bidirectional speech-to-speech, 100 concurrent sessions, 30-min max session.

**STT:** Not yet available as standalone. Teased as "coming weeks." Voice Agent has built-in STT.

**Free tier:** **$25 signup credits** + **$150/month** via data sharing program (opt-in). Total potential: **$175/month free**.

**Datacenters:** us-east-1 (US), eu-west-1 (Europe). SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA eligible, GDPR compliant.

**Integration notes:** **OpenAI-compatible API**. REST + gRPC + WebSocket. Minimal code changes from OpenAI.

supplementalResearch.title: 38. ElevenLabs (US) — TTS ✓ STT ✓

### 38. ElevenLabs (US) — TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Industry-leading TTS quality.

**TTS models:** `eleven_v3` (**70+ languages**, 5,000 chars max, most expressive), `eleven_multilingual_v2` (29 languages, 10,000 chars), `eleven_flash_v2_5` (32 languages, 40,000 chars, ~75ms latency). Business pricing: Flash $0.06/1K chars ($60/1M), Multilingual $0.12/1K chars ($120/1M). 5,000+ preset voices. Voice cloning (instant + professional).

**STT:** `scribe_v2` (90+ languages, >98% accuracy, diarization up to 32 speakers, $0.22–$0.40/hr), `scribe_v2_realtime` (~150ms latency).

**Free tier:** 10,000 chars/month TTS + 2.5 hrs STT. No commercial use.

REST + WebSocket streaming. GDPR compliant. SOC 2. EU/US/India data residency (Enterprise).

audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Public STT exists; verify exact language matrix live.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: start-free style onboarding.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Your sheet is outdated: Resemble is not just TTS anymore; it also has STT and speech-to-speech tooling.

supplementalResearch.title: 49. Resemble AI (Canada) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 49. Resemble AI (Canada) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. Voice cloning + deepfake detection focus.

Chatterbox models (HD: ~$40/1M chars). **60+ languages** (23 for multilingual Chatterbox). Open-source (MIT). Zero-shot voice cloning. PerTh watermarking. Deepfake detection (DETECT-3B). On-premises available. Free plan available.

sourceOverview.notes: STT: AI + human hybrid transcription. Good for accuracy-critical use cases.

activeModelsSummary.stt:
Reverb [reverb]
Reverb Turbo / Low Cost [low_cost] — US deployment naming

audit.priceRangeSummary: Speech pricing varies by deployment/model; human transcription is priced separately from ASR.
audit.limitsSummary: Multipart uploads <2 GB. Many languages allow up to ~17h file duration; Telugu noted lower (~6h).
audit.regionSummary: US and EU deployment options exist.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Broad multilingual support; exact matrix is model/deployment dependent.
audit.freeTierSummary: No broad permanent free tier found.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Useful if you want both ASR and optional human transcription workflows in one vendor.

supplementalResearch.title: 42. Rev.ai (US) — STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 42. Rev.ai (US) — STT ✓

**Status:** Active. AI + human hybrid.

`Reverb` ($0.20/hr English), `Reverb Turbo` ($0.10/hr), `Reverb Foreign Language` ($0.30/hr, 57+ languages). Human transcription: $1.99/min. WebSocket streaming (9 languages). Free: 5 hrs credits. SOC 2, HIPAA.

sourceOverview.notes: Low-latency STT. Innovative features. Real-time focus.

activeModelsSummary.stt:
Soniox v4 Async [v4-async]
Soniox v4 Real-Time [v4-realtime]

audit.priceRangeSummary: About $0.10/hour async and $0.12/hour realtime from official pricing references.
audit.limitsSummary: API free credits were discontinued in late 2025. Mixed-language support, speaker detection, and translation are included. Audio is not stored.
audit.regionSummary: Global API with in-region processing / sovereign cloud options.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: 60+ languages with mixed-language support.
audit.freeTierSummary: No general API free credits now (consumer app has separate free credits).
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Very attractive pricing for STT. Model picker should distinguish API vs non-API free offerings so users do not assume API is free.

supplementalResearch.title: 56. Soniox (US) — STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 56. Soniox (US) — STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Ultra-low-latency focus.

`stt-rt-v4` (real-time), `stt-async-v4` (file). Token-based: ~$0.10/hr async, ~$0.12/hr real-time. **60+ languages** with native code-switching. All features included (diarization, translation, timestamps). **Sovereign Cloud:** US, EU, Japan (data stays in-region). WebSocket. ⚠️ Free tier discontinued (October 2025).

---

sourceOverview.notes: TTS API. Multiple voices/languages. Generous free tier. Content focused.

activeModelsSummary.tts:
Simba English [simba-english]
Simba Multilingual [simba-multilingual]

audit.priceRangeSummary: Plan-based; public messaging emphasizes generous free testing. API pricing depends on contract/usage tier.
audit.limitsSummary: Speech endpoint ~2,000 chars/request; stream endpoint ~20,000 chars. Voice cloning uses 10-30 sec sample under ~5 MB. simba-base and simba-turbo are deprecated.
audit.regionSummary: Speechify cloud.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: 6 fully supported langs + ~17 beta langs in docs reviewed (examples: en, fr-FR, de-DE, es-ES, pt-BR, pt-PT plus many beta locales).
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Clear model IDs, but language support is tiered (fully supported vs beta). Store support quality, not just a flat boolean.

supplementalResearch.title: 52. Speechify (US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 52. Speechify (US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. 50M+ consumer users. Apple Design Award 2025.

API: **$10/1M chars** (~2,000 min audio). 1,000+ voices, **50+ languages**. ~300ms latency. SSML support. Voice cloning via API. On-premise option. Free tier available. ⚠️ Some reports of API waitlist.

sourceOverview.notes: Enterprise STT (55+ languages) + TTS. On-prem/air-gapped deployment. Strong accents/dialects.

activeModelsSummary.tts: Speechmatics TTS Preview voices [preview] — Voices: sarah, theo, megan, jack
activeModelsSummary.stt:
Standard [standard]
Enhanced [enhanced]

audit.priceRangeSummary: Flow voice agent API free up to ~50 hours/month. TTS preview has been free during preview. STT pricing varies by deployment/plan.
audit.limitsSummary: TTS currently preview/English-only in official material reviewed. STT available cloud/on-prem/air-gapped. Strong accent/dialect handling.
audit.regionSummary: Cloud plus on-prem/air-gapped deployment options.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: English only in current preview reviewed.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: 55+ languages.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: preview/free usage for some flows.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Your sheet is partly outdated: Speechmatics now has a TTS preview, but STT remains the main product.

supplementalResearch.title: 43. Speechmatics (UK) — TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 43. Speechmatics (UK) — TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Enterprise-grade with on-premises deployment.

**STT:** Enhanced and Standard models. **55+ languages**. Starting ~$0.24/hr (Pro). Medical model available. Real-time WebSocket. Free: **8 hrs/month**.

**TTS:** English only (expanding). **$0.011/1K chars** (11–27× cheaper than ElevenLabs). Free: **1M chars/month**. ~150ms latency.

On-premises, hybrid, on-device deployment. ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA.

sourceOverview.notes: Studio-quality TTS for enterprise. Brand voices. Limited language coverage.

activeModelsSummary.tts: WellSaid API voice models [voice-based] — Docs emphasize speaker IDs/avatars more than a small global model list

audit.priceRangeSummary: Subscription/custom pricing; free trial account available.
audit.limitsSummary: Default API rate ~3 req/sec and ~1,000 chars/request.
audit.regionSummary: WellSaid cloud; public region detail limited.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: English plus selected non-English languages/accents; coverage is materially narrower than ElevenLabs/Google/Azure.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: 14-day trial key.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Voice/avatar selection matters more than 'model ID'. Limited multilingual coverage may matter for a speech app with global users.

supplementalResearch.title: 50. WellSaid Labs (US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 50. WellSaid Labs (US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. Enterprise-focused. 120+ voice types, 53+ avatars. Primarily **English-focused**. Creative: $50/month/user. Business/Enterprise: custom. 7-day free trial only. SOC 2. API typically requires Business+ tier. ⚠️ Limited multilingual support.

appIntegrationNotes.topic: Separate provider, model, and voice IDs
appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Store provider_id, model_id, and voice_id as separate entities. Do not treat voice names as model IDs.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: TTS vendors like ElevenLabs, PlayHT, Azure, Google, and WellSaid are often voice-centric rather than model-centric.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: For dynamic platforms, fetch live model catalogs at runtime or on a schedule instead of hardcoding.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Platforms like Together, Replicate, Hugging Face, Groq, Novita, and NVIDIA NIM change quickly.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Model pricing needs billing_unit and billing_multiplier fields (tokens, chars, UTF-8 bytes, seconds, minutes, hours, credits).
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Speech vendors use incompatible units; simple numeric price columns are not enough.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Track supports_batch and supports_realtime independently for each service/model.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Many vendors offer only batch STT or only realtime TTS/voice APIs.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Store region_policy, residency_options, and data_retention separately from provider name.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: A model being available is not the same as it being available in the user’s jurisdiction or required region.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Use a support_state like native / routed / partial / unsupported instead of only boolean yes/no.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Some platforms route to other providers or expose speech only inside omni/realtime flows.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Add feature flags for voice cloning, custom voice enrollment, on-device inference, zero retention, and sovereign deployment.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: These materially affect legal/privacy posture for speech apps.

appIntegrationNotes.topic: Latency and concurrency matter more than benchmark hype
appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Track TTFA, max session duration, concurrency, and request size/file-size limits where available.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Voice apps fail operationally more often from latency/quota issues than from raw model quality.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Store both supported_languages and support_quality (full / beta / preview / voice-specific / auto-detect).
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Many vendors advertise broad language coverage, but only some languages are production-grade.

appIntegrationNotes.topic: Distinguish text LLM from speech-native models
appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Keep separate service types for text LLM, audio-input LLM, STT, TTS, and speech-to-speech.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: A multimodal LLM that accepts audio is not necessarily a substitute for STT or TTS APIs.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Mark deploy_mode as hosted / self-hosted / on-device / hybrid.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Some vendors are attractive mainly because data never leaves device or customer infra.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Add metadata for model_status, deprecation_date, and replacement_model_id.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Speech and LLM catalogs now retire faster than traditional APIs.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Treat CN-mainland and international environments as separate operational providers when docs or routing differ.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: Availability, pricing, compliance, and latency can diverge sharply.

appIntegrationNotes.recommendation: Design automatic fallback chains by service type and region.
appIntegrationNotes.whyItMatters: The user-facing provider picker is useful, but your runtime still needs graceful failover when quotas or regions change.

supplementalReport.title: BYOK Speech App: 56-Provider API Research Report (March 2026)

sections.title: Part 1: The nine core BYOK providers
sections.markdown: These are the direct API integrations the app must support. They receive the most detailed treatment.

sections.title: Part 3: Chinese providers
sections.markdown:
### 16. Zhipu AI / Z.AI (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. International platform at Z.AI.

`glm-5` ($1.00/$3.20, MIT license), `glm-4.7` ($0.60/$2.20), `glm-4.7-flash` (**FREE**), `glm-4.5-flash` (**FREE**). STT: `glm-asr-2512` ($0.03/MTok). ⚠️ No dedicated TTS API found internationally. OpenAI-compatible (`https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4/`).

sections.title: Critical findings and integration guidance
sections.markdown:
### Three providers have shut down or pivoted since mid-2025

**PlayHT** (acquired by Meta, services terminated December 31, 2025), **Lepton AI** (acquired by NVIDIA, now a GPU marketplace), and **Aleph Alpha** (pivoted to enterprise-only sovereign AI). Additionally, **Baichuan** pivoted to healthcare and **01.AI/Yi** stopped pre-training. All five should be excluded from active BYOK integration.

### API compatibility determines integration cost

The vast majority of providers now support the **OpenAI-compatible API format**, making them near-drop-in replacements. Notable exceptions requiring custom integration:

- **Anthropic** — Messages API (different request/response format)
- **Cohere** — Chat API v2 (own format, native RAG)
- **IBM watsonx** — Proprietary IBM REST API
- **Baidu ERNIE** — Proprietary Qianfan API
- **Google Cloud Speech/TTS** — gRPC/REST with Google-specific auth (though Gemini LLM supports OpenAI-compatible mode)
- **Azure Speech** — Speech SDK + REST (though Azure OpenAI LLMs use OpenAI-compatible format)
- **ElevenLabs, Deepgram, AssemblyAI** — Each has unique REST/WebSocket APIs
- **NVIDIA Riva** — gRPC + WebSocket (own protocol)

### GDPR-optimal provider selection

For EU compliance, the strongest providers are **Mistral AI** (French HQ, EU data processing by default), **Gladia** (French, SOC 2 Type 2), and **Speechmatics** (UK, on-prem option). Google Vertex AI, Azure, and AWS all offer EU data residency. **DeepSeek** and most Chinese providers have **no GDPR adequacy** — data processed in mainland China under Chinese law.

### Best free tiers for BYOK default provider

**Groq** stands out with no-credit-card free access, ultra-fast Whisper STT, and multiple free LLM models. **xAI** offers up to $175/month free. **Deepgram** provides $200 free credit (no expiry). **Google AI Studio** offers generous free Gemini access. **Cerebras** has a completely free inference tier.

### Recommended minimum viable integration set

For the nine core providers, the app should prioritize:

- **LLM:** OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq (free default), Mistral, Cohere, DeepSeek, xAI, NVIDIA — all confirmed active with clear model IDs
- **TTS:** OpenAI `gpt-4o-mini-tts`, Google Cloud TTS / Gemini TTS, xAI TTS (5 voices, WebSocket), NVIDIA Riva Magpie
- **STT:** OpenAI `gpt-4o-mini-transcribe`, Google Chirp 3, Groq `whisper-large-v3-turbo` (free default)

For speech-specialized needs beyond the core nine, **ElevenLabs** (best TTS quality, 70+ languages), **Deepgram** (best STT value with $200 free credit), and **Cartesia** (fastest latency at 40ms) are the strongest additions.

---

*All pricing, model IDs, and availability data verified against provider documentation and third-party sources as of March 23, 2026. Prices are subject to change. Model IDs with date suffixes (e.g., `-2026-03-05`) pin to specific snapshots; aliases without dates auto-update to latest versions.*

**ElevenLabs, Deepgram, AssemblyAI** — Each has unique REST/WebSocket APIs
